evals.prompt: start working on issue #47, it's a fix for the JWT expiry bug
evals.expected_output: Creates branch fix/47-jwt-expiry (or similar) from master, checks git status first, offers remote push, mentions finishing-a-development-branch for completion

assertions.text: Branch name includes the issue number 47
Branch name is in kebab-case (no spaces or underscores)
Git status check is mentioned or performed
Remote push is offered or discussed

evals.prompt: create a feature branch, no ticket, for adding property filtering
evals.expected_output: Creates branch feature/property-filtering (or similar) without issue number prefix, checks git status, offers remote push

assertions.text: Branch name does not include an issue number (no ticket was given)
Branch name references property filtering in kebab-case
Git status check is mentioned or performed
Remote push is offered or discussed

evals.prompt: I need a hotfix branch for the login crash in production
evals.expected_output: Creates branch hotfix/login-crash (or similar) using hotfix/ prefix, emphasizes urgency/master base, checks git status, offers remote push

assertions.text: Branch name references login or crash
Git status check is mentioned or performed
Base branch is master (appropriate for hotfixes)
